name: Curried Beef with Fruit
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim fat from meat; cut into 3/4-inch cubes.
2. In a large skillet, brown meat cubes and onion in hot oil.
3. Combine undrained pineapple, orange juice, tapioca, curry powder, beef bouillon granules, pepper, and bay leaves in the crockpot.
4. Add meat and onion to the cooker.
5. Cover; cook on low-heat setting for 9½-11½ hours or on high-heat setting for 3½-4½ hours.
6. Add drained apricots and cover; cook on low or high heat setting for an additional 30 minutes.
7. Serve over rice.
8. Sprinkle peanuts on top of the beef.
